text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, my joints hurt... My friends are
worried about me, but I'm still fine...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I keep telling myself that and keep my pain a
secret. But eventually, my body stops moving the
way I want it to. What if I can't run anymore?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...I end up crying like a baby, but Trainer is there
to make me feel better and says everything will
be okay.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And everything really is okay! I can hardly believe
it, but it seems I'm just going through a growth
spurt!
